seoTitle: Kensington vs Kerang East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kensington and Kerang East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kensington vs Kerang East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kensington and Kerang East.
heading: Kensington vs Kerang East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kensington, Victoria and Kerang East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kerang East has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kensington (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kensington or Kerang East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kensington has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Kerang East scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kensington scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Kerang East scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kensington or Kerang East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kerang East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
